sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: A complete guide to where big banks have supermarket branches or ATMs in Connecticut
feed.summary: This article provides a comprehensive guide to where major banks have supermarket branches or ATMs in Connecticut, detailing recent branch closures, particularly by M&T Bank, and future plans. It highlights the trend of declining brick-and-mortar bank locations due to the rise of digital banking while also identifying which banks still maintain a presence in grocery stores. The report also lists the in-state deposits and total number of branches for each of the largest banks in Connecticut.

feed.title: Caterpillar & NVIDIA: Powering Physical AI for Manufacturing
feed.summary: Caterpillar and NVIDIA are expanding their collaboration to integrate AI-driven systems into manufacturing, focusing on autonomous machinery and intelligent factory environments. This partnership, labeled "physical AI," aims to deploy real-time processing capabilities across construction, mining, and power equipment operations. Key initiatives include using NVIDIA Jetson Thor for autonomous edge processing, embedding AI assistants like the Cat AI Assistant for industrial workers, and developing digital twins for factory optimization using NVIDIA Omniverse.

feed.title: Rockwell Automation supports Tate & Lyle’s new Brazil plant
feed.summary: Rockwell Automation partnered with Tate & Lyle to establish a new, fully automated manufacturing facility in Matão, Brazil. This plant produces NUTRAVA Citrus Fiber from orange peels, supporting sustainable and clean-label food applications. The facility uses Industry 4.0-ready systems for operational efficiency and digital transformation, with plans to expand production capacity.
